items.title: Swiatek withdraws from Madrid after falling ill
items.summary: Iga Swiatek withdrew from the Madrid Open due to an unspecified illness while playing her round-of-32 match against American Ann Li.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Premier League live updates: Arsenal face Newcastle as title race continues
items.summary: Arsenal host Newcastle United at the Emirates Stadium as seek a win to heap pressure on Manchester City in Premier League title race. Follow ESPN's live coverage.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
